ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "bit_rate" INTEGER /* Bit rate of the audio file */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track has comments */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the track */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the track was created in the system */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date and time the track was recorded */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of users who have favorited the track */,
  "genre_top" INTEGER /* Primary genre of the track */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Array of genre IDs associated with the track */,
  "genres_all" TEXT /* Array of all genre IDs the track belongs to */,
  "information" TEXT /* Additional information about the track */,
  "interest" INTEGER /* Interest score for the track */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for the track */,
  "license" INTEGER /* License information for the track */,
  "listens" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been listened to */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Lyricist of the track */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Internal tracking number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the track */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if lyrics are available for the track */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the cover art for the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_top FOREIGN KEY ("genre_top") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, curator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the track */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., listen, favorite) */,
  "playback_offset" INTEGER /* Playback offset in seconds (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_access_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_tags_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_albums" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "album_id")
)
